seoTitle: New Moonta vs Newlands — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between New Moonta and Newlands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: New Moonta vs Newlands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in New Moonta and Newlands.
heading: New Moonta vs Newlands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between New Moonta, Queensland and Newlands, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: New Moonta has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Newlands (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is New Moonta or Newlands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: New Moonta has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Newlands scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: New Moonta scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Newlands scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in New Moonta or Newlands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. New Moonta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
